enemies.note: basic brigand fodder
pack hunter; Howl, Dash, Pack Sense
Impaling Lunge, Nail Down, No Retreat
Rend Flesh (+100% bodypart dmg); Dying Rage below 40% HP
level 10 beast; core stats verbatim (corroborated official + datamine). Damage-type resistances not published in fetched snippet — full-page fetch pending.
cursed carrion-eater; +3 Unholy; devours corpses to grow; weak to Fire/Sacred; skills: Necrophage, Flurry of Strikes, Bone Throw
Strangling Grasp (charge, 71% immobilize), Abominable Vitality (53% to survive lethal damage), Dark Vision
Ramming Charge (bonus dmg/stun per tile traveled); Dying Rage below 40% HP
Rapid Flight, Peck (blinds), Baleful Scream (psionic daze), Elusive Predators (+50% dodge, +25% counter unless wings injured)
Spectre: 70% phys res but very low HP; weak to Magic/Sacred. Grave Chill (immobilize), Spectral Haunting (vanish & ambush)
Ramming Charge (bonus per tile), Rend Flesh (+100% bodypart dmg)
Dagger duelist: Double Lunge, Deadly Trick (swap places), Seize the Initiative, Elusiveness, Dash, Dagger Throw
Tier 4 Brigand; +27 Slashing; shield user (Cleaving Strike, Onrush, Fencer Stance, Raise Shield, Shield Bash); weak to Shock
Elite bowman (replaces Archer/Crossbowman/Skeleton Archer stand-ins): Taking Aim, Long Shot, Headshot, Suppression, Hard Target
BOSS (Burial Cave): Lion Leap, Primal Aether, Vengeance of the Dead, Animated Servant, Bone Pyres, Deadly Tail (poison/curse), Indomitable
Mini-boss: Lesser Ritual of Resurrection (reanimates undead), Binding Sigil, Steal Essence, Hail of Blows
Claw Swipe (range 3, huge bonuses above 10% energy), Earthshaking Strike (AoE stun/daze); 35% res to everything
Tier 4 giant spider; +16 Piercing +8 Poison +4 Caustic; regenerating carapace; 65% Immob chance (web spit)
Tier 2 Proselyte matriarch; +15 Piercing +3 Unholy; life/energy leech; weak to Sacred (-60%)
Proselyte spearman (replaces Proselyte stand-in): Nail Down, Bloodthirst, Blood Scent, Precise Hits; weak to Sacred
Prologue final boss (Phase 2): Bestial Charge (666% dmg line), Wild Swipe, Jump Away, Corpse Devourment, Phantom Bats; weak to Sacred

basic brigand fodder; crushing, dazes

shielded; skills: Cut Through, Raise Shield, Shield Bash
shielded; skills: Mighty Kick, Onslaught, Raise Shield (formerly Sidekick)
shielded; skills: Mighty Kick, Onslaught, Moment of Weakness

2H sword; skills: Hewing Strike, Seize the Initiative, Not This Time

T5 armored undead knight; +6 Unholy; heavy shield kit (Cleaving Strike, Raise Shield, Shield Bash, Hold the Line, Unyielding Defense...)
undead caster (WIL 26); +7 Unholy; heals allies; skills: Death Touch, Unholy Blessing, Binding Sigil, Curse of Agony
mini-boss; STR 33 tank; +3 Unholy; skills: Mighty Swing, Brace for Impact, Fall of Giants, Unsteady Gait
mini-boss necromancer (WIL 18); +13 Unholy; resurrects undead; skills: Defiled Remains, Rituals of Resurrection, Death Touch, Steal Essence, Binding Sigil
spectre; +3 Frost +5 Unholy; near-immune to physical, weak to Sacred/Magic/Arcane; skills: Grave Chill, Spectral Haunting, Cleaving Strike, Gloat

mini-boss necromancer (WIL 16); +9 Unholy; raises skeletons & resurrects; skills: Defiled Remains, Ritual of Resurrection, Death Touch, Steal Essence
vampire cultist (AGL 17); +5 Rending +1 Unholy; gets stronger when hurt; skills: Lash Blessing, Lacerate, Driven by Pain
weak vampire neophyte; +1 Unholy; no skills; also appears as a quest enemy
self-sacrificing support (PRC 17); heals allies when hurt, buffs ally on death; becomes Dead Martyr; no loot
vampire heresiarch caster (WIL 23); +5 Unholy; summons Blood Golems, life-drain; skills: Summon Blood Golem, Draining Sigil, Mark of the Feast, Life Leech, Bloodthirst
vampire elite bruiser; +3 Unholy; life/energy drain; skills: Wild Swipe, Life Leech, Bloodthirst, Flurry of Strikes, Mighty Kick
mini-boss giant (STR 42, 315 HP); +6 Unholy; Psionic fear/immob; skills: Face of Horror, Devastating Power, Herald of Ruination, Bloodthirst, Final Push
self-sacrificing cultist; +1 Unholy; buffs Proselytes on death (Blood Oath); heals allies when hurt
mini-boss flesh-horror (STR 26 VIT 33); +9 Rending +3 Unholy; caps dmg/turn & spawns Blood Golems, revives on death; skills: Bound by Blood, Wild Swipe, Rend Flesh, Bloodthirst
quest boss (Troll Hunt), one per map near Signal Tower; regenerates below 75% HP — interrupt with a melee hit to make it take ~2× damage; +40 Rending
Tier 3 Brigand; +28 Slashing; weak to Shock
Tier 5 spider matriarch; +26 Piercing +6 Poison +2 Caustic; regenerating carapace (high phys res + 300% Pain Res); 50% Immob, 70% Bleed chance
Tier 4 spawner — creates Crawlers; immobile; weak to Fire; near-immune to Poison/Psionic; destroy to stop spawns
